query.sparql:
SELECT ?work ?workLabel
WHERE
{
  ?author wdt:P50 ?work.
  ?work wdt:P50 ?author.
  ?author wdt:P9687 "Yoshihiro".
  ?author wdt:P50 ?otherWork.
  FILTER (?work != ?otherWork)
  ?otherWork wdt:P31 wd:Q47461344.
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". }
}

How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?
How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?president p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?position .
  ?position wdt:P279* wd:Q11696 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?date .
  FILTER (xsd:gYear(?date) > 1990) .
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?
Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?seasonCount
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q1441637 .
  ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
  ?season wdt:P2522 ?championship .
  FILTER(wd:Q18156668 = ?championship) .
  FILTER(wd:Q131236 = ?team) .
  {
    SELECT ?team (COUNT(?season) AS ?seasonCount)
    WHERE {
      ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q1441637 .
      ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
      ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
      ?season wdt:P2522 ?championship .
      FILTER(wd:Q18156668 = ?championship) .
      FILTER(wd:Q131236 = ?team) .
    }
    GROUP BY ?team
  }
}
FILTER(?seasonCount >= 2)

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?lebronJoinYear ?kobeLeaveYear
WHERE {
  wd:Q36159 p:P54 ?lebronMembership .
  ?lebronMembership ps:P54 wd:Q142701 .
  ?lebronMembership pq:P5138 ?lebronJoinYear .

  wd:Q25369 p:P54 ?kobeMembership .
  ?kobeMembership ps:P54 wd:Q142701 .
  ?kobeMembership pq:P5138 ?kobeLeaveYear .
  FILTER (?lebronJoinYear = ?kobeLeaveYear)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?company wdt:P161 "Tencent" .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) > 1)

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190156 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}

LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy
WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P298 "Iran" .
  ?observation owl:sameAs ?country .
  ?observation p:P2250 ?lifeExpectancyStatement .
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement ps:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy .
  ?observation p:P585 ?yearStatement .
  ?yearStatement ps:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "1999-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  ?previousYearStatement p:P585 ?previousYear .
  ?previousLifeExpectancyStatement ps:P2250 ?previousLifeExpectancy .
  FILTER (?previousYear = (?year - "P1Y"^^xsd:duration)) .
  FILTER (?lifeExpectancy > ?previousLifeExpectancy) .
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?brother) AS (?livingBrothers))
WHERE {
  wd:Q189307 wdt:P22 ?father .

  FILTER (?brother != wd:Q189307) .
  OPTIONAL { ?brother wdt:P509 ?dateOfDeath } .
  FILTER (!BOUND(?dateOfDeath))
}

  ?item wdt:P407 wd:Q188 .

question.string: What are the names of the head of states of Germany and France ?
What are the professions of John Lennon’s sons?
What are the titles of the Star Wars series movies?
What came first: the TV show The Flintstones or the end of racial discrimination in voting in the US ?
What colors does the German national flag have?
What did the suffragettes stand for?
What do you call a female form of an emperor in English?
What event killed the most people in the years 1910 to 1920?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?event ?eventLabel (COUNT(?person) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P20 ?place .
  ?person wdt:P509 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P1465 ?category .
  FILTER(YEAR(?personDeath) >= 1910) .
  FILTER(YEAR(?personDeath) <= 1920) .
  ?person wdt:P570 ?personDeath .
}
GROUP BY ?event ?eventLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
